title: PINGEUI 200 Pack 12 OZ (350 ml) Eco-Friendly Sugarcane Bowls, Round Extra Strength Bowls for Parties, BBQ, Picnic, Hot and Cold Foods, White
features: ECO-FRIENDLY MATERIAL - Our paper bowls are made with food-grade sugar cane pulp as a material. It's super strong and enough to hold heavier foods. It won't bend or fold even when full of food.

OIL AND WATER RESISTANT - Bagasse bowls are stronger than plastic and regular paper bowls. So they can tolerate cold/hot food and won't be easily damaged by cutlery, hot or greasy food. Even when poured into a drink, it will not soften.

MICROWAVE AND REFRIGERATOR SAFE - Whether you're using our sugarcane bowls in summer or winter, it's ready for your year-round use. You're safe in the microwave or in the refrigerator. With these versatile bowls, you can cook your dinner fast

WIDE RANGE OF APPLICATIONS - You can use these bagasse bowls to serve any type of food: hot meals, desserts, salads, stews, ice cream and anything else you can think of. It can save you a lot of trouble in cleaning up on festivals such as barbecues and parties, and make your party go more smoothly!

AFTER-SALES SERVICE - We hope you are satisfied with our products, which is why we provide you with a risk-free purchase. If you have any questions or dissatisfaction with our paper bowls, please feel free to contact us. We'll get back to you within 24 hours. 30-day refund is available.
description: ABOUT US PINGEUI is committed to providing practical and affordable white paper bowls. We are energetic to welcome every customer and enthusiastically provide customers with professional and useful product information. WHY CHOOSING US ? A value set of 200 paper bowls, each bowl holds 12oz (350ml). The bowls are approximately 135 x 135 x 43 mm/5.3 x 5.3 x 1.7 inch. Our round paper bowls in neutral colors with an embossed finish. Simple yet stylish, they will easily complement any party decor or theme. The white paper bowls are made of bagasse sugarcane pulp Food-grade white paper bowls are clean and hygienic, you can use it with your family at ease. PRODUCT DETAILS: Material: Plastic Color: White Size: 5.3 x 5.3 x 1.7 inch/135 x 135 x 43 mm Capacity: 350 ml (12 oz) Weight: 8g/pc PACKAGE CONTENTS: 200 x Paper Bowls
